tracks.meaning: to cut or make neat by removing excess material from edges or borders
to reduce body weight or fat, typically through diet and exercise
to reduce costs or expenses, often by cutting non-essential items
to remove unnecessary data or files to reduce file size or storage space
narrow strips of wood or metal used as finishing pieces around doors, windows, or walls
a neat and orderly appearance or condition of clothing and personal grooming
the slope or angle of a roof or structural surface
in good condition or proper working order, or well-organized and neat
to adjust the sails and rigging of a boat to catch the wind efficiently
to cut paper or printed sheets to a specified size or remove excess margins
to remove or cut portions of a script or performance for length or pacing
